theme_and_archetype.description: A high-tension, energetic dark mode aesthetic that uses pure white typography and signature Yandex Yellow (#FFCC00) to cut through deep, moody backgrounds. Emphasizes authority, speed, and premium technology through 3D depth and high contrast.

typography.strategy: Swiss Brutalist (Tech/Art) - High contrast in weights and striking proportions.

headings.usage: Massive, bold, tight tracking for all primary marketing messages and hero text.

body.usage: Clean, highly readable geometric sans for descriptions and UI elements.

accent.usage: Small technical details, overlines, and labels (e.g., 'EST. TIME', 'DISTANCE').

layout_and_surfaces.spacing_system: Generous Spacing (Tailwind Scale) with high tension asymmetry.

surface_strategies.cards: Solid deep gray (#121212) with 1px border (border-white/10). No soft shadows, rely on stark contrast.
surface_strategies.glassmorphism: Used ONLY for the sticky nav bar: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 with a 1px border-b border-white/10.
surface_strategies.borders: Minimalist sharp corners. Use rounded-none or max rounded-md (4px-8px) for a tech-focused Swiss look.

grid_modes.marketing_bento: Tetris Grid for the Benefits section. Mix col-span-4 and col-span-8 to create asymmetrical tension.

hero_3d_scene.concept: A sleek, highly reflective 3D Yandex taxi rotating in a dark void.
hero_3d_scene.technical: Use R3F with <Stage> or <Environment preset='city'> for realistic metallic car paint reflections. The car should slowly rotate automatically, and respond slightly to mouse movement (parallax via <PresentationControls>).

map_3d_scene.concept: Dark mode interactive city map with glowing yellow route arcs.
map_3d_scene.technical: Use react-map-gl with a dark mapbox style. Overlay an animated sweeping route line. If WebGL is heavy, fake the 3D map tilt using CSS transform (rotateX) on a high-res night city map background.

scroll_animations.smooth_scroll: Lenis is MANDATORY for premium momentum scrolling.
scroll_animations.parallax_icons: Small 3D primitives (spheres, cubes, or 3D pins) floating in the background, rotating based on framer-motion useScroll() tied to the Y offset.
scroll_animations.text_reveal: Headings must animate in via staggered line masks (y: 100% to 0, overflow-hidden wrapper).

navigation.layout: Brand logo left, links center (hidden on mobile), solid yellow 'Download App' CTA button right.

hero.layout: Split composition. Left: Massive typographic hook overlapping the center. Center/Right: The R3F Canvas showing the 3D rotating car.
hero.content: H1: 'Move to the rhythm of the city.' CTA: 'Order Now' (Solid Yellow) + 'Learn More' (Outline White).
hero.visuals: Dark background with a subtle radial glow behind the car using the primary_glow color.

tariffs.layout: Horizontal scrollable flex container or a CSS grid.
tariffs.card_style: Sharp corners, border-l-4 border-l-transparent hover:border-l-[#FFCC00] transition-all. High contrast typography for pricing.

how_it_works.visuals: Accompanied by 3D animated icons (R3F or Framer Motion SVGs) that light up as the user scrolls past each step (ScrollSpy).

app_download.layout: 2-column grid. Left: Text + App Store / Google Play badges. Right: Floating black smartphone mockup.
app_download.background: Deep gray with an aggressive diagonal layout (skew-y).

footer.layout: Massive padding (py-32). Top: Huge brand text 'YANDEX.TAXI' spanning full width. Bottom: Grid of links and legal text in gray.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FFCC00] text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wide px-8 py-4 hover:bg-[#FFDB4D] hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wide px-8 py-4 hover:border-white hover:bg-white/5 transition-all duration-300

badges.style: bg-white/10 text-white text-xs px-3 py-1 uppercase tracking-widest backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10

images.description: Black iPhone turned on in dark environment. Use for the App Download section.
images.usage_instructions: Clip out the background or use a blend mode (screen/lighten) to merge seamlessly into the dark section.

icons.style: Duotone or Fill, used at large scales (48px+)

testing.rules: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) and major sections MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Dark Theme + Archetype 4 (Swiss/High-Contrast) aesthetic. Do not introduce light-mode panels.
Use Cabinet Grotesk for Headings and Manrope for Body.

For the 3D Hero: Ensure @react-three/fiber and @react-three/drei are installed. Use a placeholder 3D model (like a Box or a simple car geometry if a GLTF is not available) but structure the R3F Canvas to accept an environment, lighting, and presentation controls.
For the Map: If react-map-gl is too complex for the MVP, simulate the 3D map using a CSS-transformed background pattern (rotateX) with Framer Motion animated SVG paths.
Ensure the hero heading overlaps the 3D canvas slightly to create spatial tension.
Never use raw #000000 for backgrounds; stick to #0A0A0A or #121212 to preserve shadow rendering.
Use the provided App Mockup image URL from Unsplash for the 'App Download' section.
